note: refactor-plan turns EXISTING findings registers (from refactor-audit / refactor-smells under .marvin/refactor/) into a sequenced, risk-annotated plan of small behaviour-preserving steps; oversized items route to task-start. It reads-and-sequences — it does not discover findings (audit/smells) or mutate code (refactor-apply). mock_rate encodes the ideal outcome for --decider mock; real deciders ignore it.

queries.text: plan the refactoring from the audit findings

marvin refactor plan — order the findings by dependency and risk
